mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND role = 0
AND id != #{excludeUserId}
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id ASC
